Avenger of Zendikar.name: Avenger of Zendikar
Avenger of Zendikar.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, create a 0/1 green Plant creature token for each land you control.
Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, you may put a +1/+1 counter on each Plant creature you control.

Beast Within.name: Beast Within
Beast Within.oracle_text: Destroy target permanent. Its controller creates a 3/3 green Beast creature token.

Boseiju, Who Endures.name: Boseiju, Who Endures
Boseiju, Who Endures.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {G}.
Channel — {1}{G}, Discard this card: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or nonbasic land an opponent controls. That player may search their library for a land card with a basic land type, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each legendary creature you control.

Brainstorm.name: Brainstorm
Brainstorm.oracle_text: Draw three cards, then put two cards from your hand on top of your library in any order.

Command Tower.name: Command Tower
Command Tower.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

Craterhoof Behemoth.name: Craterhoof Behemoth
Craterhoof Behemoth.oracle_text:
Haste
When this creature enters, creatures you control gain trample and get +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of creatures you control.

Cultivate.name: Cultivate
Cultivate.oracle_text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.

Cyclonic Rift.name: Cyclonic Rift
Cyclonic Rift.oracle_text:
Return target nonland permanent you don't control to its owner's hand.
Overload {6}{U} (You may cast this spell for its overload cost. If you do, change "target" in its text to "each.")

Elvish Visionary.name: Elvish Visionary
Elvish Visionary.oracle_text: When this creature enters, draw a card.

Eternal Witness.name: Eternal Witness
Eternal Witness.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may return target card from your graveyard to your hand.

Evolving Wilds.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

Heroic Intervention.name: Heroic Intervention
Heroic Intervention.oracle_text: Permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

Lotus Petal.name: Lotus Petal
Lotus Petal.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

Midnight Tilling.name: Midnight Tilling
Midnight Tilling.oracle_text: Mill four cards, then you may return a permanent card from among them to your hand. (To mill four cards, put the top four cards of your library into your graveyard.)

Oracle of Mul Daya.oracle_text:
You may play an additional land on each of your turns.
Play with the top card of your library revealed.
You may play lands from the top of your library.

Ponder.name: Ponder
Ponder.oracle_text:
Look at the top three cards of your library, then put them back in any order. You may shuffle.
Draw a card.

Rampant Growth.oracle_text: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

Ramunap Excavator.name: Ramunap Excavator
Ramunap Excavator.oracle_text: You may play lands from your graveyard.

Regrowth.name: Regrowth
Regrowth.oracle_text: Return target card from your graveyard to your hand.

Reliquary Tower.oracle_text:

Rhystic Study.name: Rhystic Study
Rhystic Study.oracle_text: Whenever an opponent casts a spell, you may draw a card unless that player pays {1}.

Sakura-Tribe Elder.name: Sakura-Tribe Elder
Sakura-Tribe Elder.oracle_text: Sacrifice this creature: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

Solemn Simulacrum.name: Solemn Simulacrum
Solemn Simulacrum.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
When this creature dies, you may draw a card.

Sylvan Library.name: Sylvan Library
Sylvan Library.oracle_text: At the beginning of your draw step, you may draw two additional cards. If you do, choose two cards in your hand drawn this turn. For each of those cards, pay 4 life or put the card on top of your library.

Tatyova, Benthic Druid.name: Tatyova, Benthic Druid
Tatyova, Benthic Druid.oracle_text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, you gain 1 life and draw a card.

Zendikar Resurgent.name: Zendikar Resurgent
Zendikar Resurgent.oracle_text:
Whenever you tap a land for mana, add one mana of any type that land produced. (The types of mana are white, blue, black, red, green, and colorless.)
Whenever you cast a creature spell, draw a card.
